name: OneDrive
description: OneDrive is Microsoft's cloud storage service, accessed through the Microsoft Graph API. It lets you upload, download, organize, search, and share files and folders across OneDrive personal, OneDrive for Business, and SharePoint document libraries.

capabilities.name: upload_file
capabilities.description: Upload a file to OneDrive at a specified path. For files under 4 MB use simple upload; larger files require an upload session.

capabilities.name: download_file
capabilities.description: Download the content of a file from OneDrive by its item ID or path.

capabilities.name: list_children
capabilities.description: List all files and subfolders within a folder in OneDrive, returning metadata for each item.

capabilities.name: create_folder
capabilities.description: Create a new folder inside an existing folder or at the root of the user's OneDrive.

capabilities.name: search_files
capabilities.description: Search for files and folders across the user's entire OneDrive by name or content keywords.

capabilities.name: share_item
capabilities.description: Create a sharing link for a file or folder to allow others to access it with specified permissions.
